summary: Completed full backend API testing (13 tests, all pass) and frontend UI testing for Deployment Doctor. All 12 acceptance criteria verified.
critical_code_review_comments: AI Summary is MOCKED - uses deterministic fallback template since OPENROUTER_API_KEY is not set (ai_summary_available=false in response). This is expected per design.

success_rate.frontend: 100% - all pages load, all sections present

context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs working: health (blueprints=10, rules=90), /api/samples (11 scenarios), /api/incidents (10 blueprints), /api/analyze (DB failure=CONFIDENT/100%, unknown=INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE, root cause demo=DB_CONNECTION_FAILURE primary + CRASH_LOOP_BACKOFF contributing). Frontend: dark theme, upload dropzone, 11 demo cards, full report page with all sections, knowledge base with search filter, AI summary collapsed by default. AI Summary is MOCKED (deterministic fallback).

verified_acceptance_criteria.1_home_page_dark_theme: PASS - dark bg rgb(15,17,23), dropzone and analyze button present
verified_acceptance_criteria.3_run_demo_db_connection: PASS - navigates to /report/{id} with DB_CONNECTION_FAILURE as primary
verified_acceptance_criteria.4_report_page_sections: PASS - Primary Incident, Detection Status CONFIDENT, Confidence 100%, Evidence Attribution 11 records, Relationship Graph, Verification Commands, Recommended Fixes, Audit Trail, Engine Metadata, AI Summary all present
verified_acceptance_criteria.5_knowledge_base_10_blueprints: PASS - 10 blueprints listed with search filter working
verified_acceptance_criteria.12_ai_summary_collapsed: PASS - AI Summary section exists, collapsed by default

mocked_apis: OpenRouter API - AI Summary uses deterministic fallback (ai_summary_available=false)
